overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a dark, rainy industrial district at night. The player navigates a high-performance vehicle through enclosed concrete corridors and open industrial yards, encountering neon-lit cyberpunk architecture and occasional vehicles while speeds vary from 15 to 100 km/h.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed industrial transport corridor with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: speeding through the enclosed industrial corridor at 90-100 km/h with steady acceleration

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining the left side of the narrow industrial passage
tall concrete walls lining the right side of the narrow industrial passage
metal beams and concrete overpasses covering the corridor ceiling
green and red neon light fixtures mounted on the corridor walls
rain-slicked asphalt road reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving through a narrow, enclosed industrial corridor. Concrete walls flank both sides with overhead metal structures covering the passage. Green and red neon lighting strips illuminate the rain-slicked asphalt as the vehicle accelerates through the cyberpunk industrial tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with metal scaffolding and parked vehicles

events.description: passing a large industrial truck parked on the right side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: slowing down while navigating past the parked truck and continuing through the winding industrial passage

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck parked stationary on the right side of the narrow corridor

entered.detail: large weathered truck parked against the right wall of the corridor
rusted metal scaffolding and industrial equipment along the left wall
concrete overpass structure spanning the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the industrial corridor, the vehicle encounters and passes a large parked truck on the right side. Metal scaffolding and industrial equipment line the left wall while concrete overpasses span overhead. The speed decreases as the driver navigates the winding enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight industrial passage transitioning to open yard

events.description: executing a sharp turn that reduces speed from 70 km/h to 16 km/h
exiting the enclosed corridor into a more open industrial yard with large warehouse structures

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns and slowing significantly before accelerating through the open industrial yard

entered.detail: massive industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding
chain-link metal fence running along the right side of the road
concrete road barriers and dividers along the left edge
tall cylindrical industrial silo visible on the right side
large red neon sign on the industrial building ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through tighter industrial passages, executing a sharp turn that drops speed to 16 km/h. Industrial warehouses and silos become visible as the enclosed corridor opens into a larger yard. Red neon signage illuminates the massive industrial complex ahead as the vehicle begins to accelerate again.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with massive warehouse structures

events.description: accelerating from 40 km/h to 96 km/h through the open industrial zone

agents.ego_description: accelerating rapidly through the open industrial area toward the massive complex ahead

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial complex with illuminated windows and neon accents
large cylindrical storage tanks visible on the right horizon
industrial loading dock structure on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows rapid acceleration through an open industrial yard toward a massive illuminated complex. Storage tanks and loading docks line the route as the vehicle reaches speeds of 96 km/h. The red neon signage grows larger as the vehicle approaches the industrial facility, with distant city lights visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a vast, neon-lit warehouse complex. It begins with a rapid surge through a narrow concrete tunnel, where green and red neon strips reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt beneath overhead metal structures. As the vehicle continues, the camera passes a large parked truck and navigates beneath concrete overpasses, slowing down while weaving through metal scaffolding and industrial equipment. The scene then shifts as a sharp turn leads the vehicle out of the tight passages and into a larger yard, where the enclosed walls give way to massive silos and red neon signage. Finally, the camera accelerates rapidly past storage tanks and loading docks toward the illuminated industrial facility, with distant city lights shimmering through the rain.
